channel.title: GitHub OCaml Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of OCaml in GitHub

item.title: facebook/infer
item.description: A static analyzer for Java, C, C++, and Objective-C

item.title: coq/coq
item.description: Coq is a formal proof management system. It provides a formal language to write mathematical definitions, executable algorithms and theorems together with an environment for semi-interactive development of machine-checked proofs.

item.title: semgrep/semgrep
item.description: Lightweight static analysis for many languages. Find bug variants with patterns that look like source code.

item.title: semgrep/ocaml-tree-sitter-core
item.description: OCaml code generator and runtime library for handling typed tree-sitter CSTs

item.title: facebook/flow
item.description: Adds static typing to JavaScript to improve developer productivity and code quality.

item.title: MinaProtocol/mina
item.description: Mina is a cryptocurrency protocol with a constant size blockchain, improving scaling while maintaining decentralization and security.
